narrative:
Precinct Barnesville Village 2 (precinct in Belmont County) has 698 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.6 percentage points.
